title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Microbiological methods - Part 1: Determination of a population of microorganisms on products
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 微生物学方法 - 第1部分：产品上微生物群落的测定

standards.scope: Bioburden testing methods for medical devices.
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for determining the population of viable microorganisms on or in a medical device, component, raw material or package.

title.en: Sterilization of health-care products - Ethylene oxide - Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 环氧乙烷 - 灭菌过程的开发、确认和常规控制要求

standards.scope: EO sterilization process development, validation and routine control.
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of an ethylene oxide sterilization process for medical devices.
standards.note: ISO/FDIS 11135 (Ed.3) is at FDIS stage as of May 2026; current published edition remains 2014+Amd1:2018.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Biological indicators - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 生物指示物 - 第1部分：通则

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements and test methods for biological indicators used in sterilization validation.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Biological indicators - Part 2: Biological indicators for ethylene oxide sterilization processes
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 生物指示物 - 第2部分：环氧乙烷灭菌用生物指示物

standards.scope: Biological indicators for EO sterilization processes.
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for biological indicators intended to assess the performance of ethylene oxide sterilization processes.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Vocabulary of terms used in sterilization and related equipment and process standards
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 术语词汇

standards.abstract: Defines vocabulary and terms used in sterilization and related procedures for healthcare products.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Radiation - Part 1: Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 辐射 - 第1部分：灭菌过程的开发、确认和常规控制要求

standards.abstract: Requirements for radiation sterilization process development, validation and routine control.
standards.note: Second edition published 2025-04-02. Replaces ISO 11137-1:2006 and its amendments.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Radiation - Part 2: Establishing the sterilization dose
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 辐射 - 第2部分：灭菌剂量的确定

standards.abstract: Methods for establishing the sterilization dose for radiation sterilization.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Moist heat - Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 湿热 - 灭菌过程的开发、确认和常规控制要求

standards.abstract: Requirements for moist heat (steam) sterilization process development, validation and routine control. Replaces ISO 17665-1:2006.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Microbiological methods - Part 2: Tests of sterility performed in the definition, validation and maintenance of a sterilization process
title.zh: 保健品灭菌 - 微生物学方法 - 第2部分：灭菌过程中使用的无菌试验

standards.scope: Sterility testing for sterilization process validation.
standards.abstract: Specifies tests of sterility performed in the definition, validation and maintenance of a sterilization process.
